official_names.en: Residence for study (higher and secondary education)
official_names.zh-Hans: 学习居留（高等教育与中等教育）

aliases: Residence visa for research, study, internship and volunteer work

status_note_md.en: The EU Immigration Portal describes a residence visa plus temporary residence permit path for studying in Portugal. A Portuguese government article also states that holders of a residence permit for research, study, internship or volunteer work may exercise subordinate or independent professional activity alongside the main activity and may register with IEFP.
status_note_md.zh-Hans: 欧盟移民门户描述了在葡萄牙学习的居留签证加临时居留许可路径。葡萄牙政府文章亦说明，持研究、学习、实习或志愿服务居留许可者可在主要活动之外从事从属或独立职业活动，并可在 IEFP 登记。

summary_md.en: A Portuguese study residence route for non-EU students admitted to higher or secondary education. Applicants usually obtain a residence visa (about four months to enter and apply for a residence permit), then a temporary residence permit that is typically valid for one year and renewable. Higher-education study time counts by half toward long-term residence. After studies, work is possible with a separate temporary residence permit.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 面向获高等或中等教育录取的非欧盟学生的葡萄牙学习居留途径。申请人通常取得居留签证（约四个月入境并申请居留许可），再获得一般一年有效、可续期的临时居留许可。高等教育学习时间按一半计入长期居留。学业结束后可凭单独的临时居留许可工作。

good_for_md.en: Students admitted to a Portuguese higher-education institution (or eligible secondary programme) who can show means of subsistence, insurance, and other visa and permit documents.
good_for_md.zh-Hans: 适合获葡萄牙高等教育机构（或合资格中等教育项目）录取，并能出示生活费、保险及其他签证与许可材料的学生。

not_good_for_md.en: Applicants without school admission, people seeking unrestricted work only without study, or a pure digital-nomad stay (Portugal has a separate digital-nomad route). Secondary-level students face stricter work limits on the EU portal profile.
not_good_for_md.zh-Hans: 不适合没有学校录取、仅寻求不受限制工作而不学习，或纯数字游民停留的申请人（葡萄牙另有数字游民途径）。欧盟门户对中等教育学生工作限制更严。

note_md.en: You must be admitted to a higher-education institution or secondary school. Secondary-education applicants are generally 14–21 and need host-family or accommodation arrangements under exchange or individual admission rules.
note_md.zh-Hans: 必须获高等教育机构或中学录取。中等教育申请人一般为 14–21 岁，并需按交换或个人录取规则安排接待家庭或住宿。

note_md.en: The EU portal requires sufficient means of subsistence, travel insurance, and generally a return ticket for the visa stage. For the higher-education residence permit, confirmation of enrolment, fee payment, means, and health coverage are listed; some admitted higher-education students may be exempt from certain means or fee-payment evidence under Portuguese ordinance rules cited on the portal.
note_md.zh-Hans: 欧盟门户在签证阶段要求足够生活费、旅行保险，并通常要求回程票。高等教育居留许可阶段列出注册确认、缴费、生活费与健康保险；按门户引用的葡萄牙法令，部分已录取高等教育学生可豁免部分生活费或缴费证明。

stability_requirement_md.en: The study route uses means of subsistence and school admission rather than an employment income threshold.
stability_requirement_md.zh-Hans: 学习途径使用生活费与学校录取要求，而不是就业收入门槛。

application_processing_time_md.en: A residence visa allows about four months in Portugal to apply for a residence permit. Higher-education temporary permits are generally valid for one year, renewable for further one-year periods or for the remaining study period if shorter. Secondary-education permits may not exceed one year, renewable for a further year if conditions remain met.
application_processing_time_md.zh-Hans: 居留签证允许在葡萄牙停留约四个月以申请居留许可。高等教育临时许可一般一年有效，可按一年续期或按剩余学习期（若更短）。中等教育许可最长一年，条件仍满足时可再续一年。

note_md.en: The EU portal says residence-permit holders for study or student exchange (and some trainee or volunteer statuses) are entitled to family reunification with a spouse and minor or dependent children under stated rules.
note_md.zh-Hans: 欧盟门户说明学习或学生交换（及部分实习或志愿服务身份）居留许可持有人，在规定规则下有权与配偶及未成年或受抚养子女团聚。

summary_md.en: Study residence is temporary. The EU portal states that the stay is taken into account by half when calculating residence for long-term or permanent residence. After studies, work requires obtaining the necessary temporary residence permit.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 学习居留是临时的。欧盟门户说明在计算长期或永久居留时，该停留时间按一半计入。学业结束后工作需另行取得必要的临时居留许可。

summary_md.en: The student portal profile does not establish citizenship eligibility.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 学生门户专题没有确认公民资格。

rationale_md.en: Primary detail is from the EU Immigration Portal; Portuguese consular checklists and AIMA practice may differ. The 2022 government article supports concurrent work rights for some study-related residence permits but is not a full fee schedule.
rationale_md.zh-Hans: 主要细节来自欧盟移民门户；葡萄牙领事清单与 AIMA 实践可能不同。2022 年政府文章支持部分学习相关居留许可并行工作权利，但不是完整费用表。

/timeline.section: Residence visa four months; permit one year renewable

/rights.section: Holders of residence permit for research, study, internship or volunteer work

/pr_pathway.section: Long-term residence half credit for study stay

changelog.summary: Added Portugal study residence coverage from the EU Immigration Portal and concurrent work note from the government Foreigners Act article.
